layout.strategy: MODE B: THE CONTROL ROOM GRID

surfaces.headers: bg-[#09090B]/80 backdrop-blur-xl border-b border-white/10 z-50 sticky top-0

buttons.primary: bg-[#2563EB] text-white hover:bg-[#1D4ED8] rounded-md px-4 py-2 font-medium tracking-wide transition-all
buttons.secondary: bg-[#1A1A1D] text-white border border-white/10 hover:bg-white/5 rounded-md px-4 py-2 font-medium transition-all

inputs.base: bg-[#121214] border border-white/10 rounded-md px-3 py-2 text-white placeholder:text-white/40 focus:border-[#2563EB] focus:ring-1 focus:ring-[#2563EB] transition-colors

badges.base: px-2.5 py-0.5 rounded-full text-xs font-medium bg-[#2563EB]/10 text-[#2563EB] border border-[#2563EB]/20

tables.header: bg-[#121214] border-b border-white/10 text-xs uppercase tracking-wider text-white/60

icons.instructions: Use lucide-react icons. Standard size 20px (w-5 h-5) for general UI, 16px (w-4 h-4) for dense data/buttons.

accessibility.testing: All interactive and key informational elements MUST include a 'data-testid' attribute (e.g., data-testid='login-button', data-testid='metric-card-leads', data-testid='sidebar-nav-crm')
accessibility.contrast: Ensure text contrast meets APCA/WCAG AA standards. Text on dark backgrounds must be sufficiently light.

instructions_to_main_agent: App must be implemented in JavaScript (.js/.jsx) with React.
Use standard HTML tags and Tailwind CSS for layouts. Avoid overusing Shadcn layout primitives like Card, instead use semantic HTML with bento-grid utility classes.
Apply Shadcn for complex interactions like Dialog, DropdownMenu, Tabs, Select, and Calendar.
App Layout: Implement a main Sidebar navigation (collapsible on mobile via a hamburger icon) and a sticky Topbar for user profile/global actions.
Dashboard grid logic: Apply MODE B (The Control Room Grid). Use grid-cols-1 md:grid-cols-3 lg:grid-cols-4 with gap-4 or gap-6. Make widgets span 1 to 3 columns based on importance.
Include Manrope (Headings) and IBM Plex Sans (Body) fonts. Include via Google Fonts in index.html.
Primary brand color is Blue (#2563EB), use it for primary CTA buttons, active states, and key highlights.
No logo needed yet, use clean text 'Villapel OS' in the sidebar header with font-black or font-extrabold.
Never use purple or teal. Stick to high-contrast monochrome with blue accents.
